svg.title: LithePG result export UI wiring evidence
svg.desc: Visual receipt showing strict TDD red/green verification for wiring the results-grid Export button to the on-device CSV/JSON ResultExporter via an NSSavePanel.

text.font-family: SF Pro Display, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: 2026-06-29 · v1.1 backlog: enable the results-grid Export button
failed to compile as expected: no member 'canExport' / 'exportContent' (3 tests written first)
Export toolbar button now a CSV/JSON menu, enabled only for row results with columns
NSSavePanel writes UTF-8 via on-device ResultExporter · no network/credentials/auto-run SQL
✓ swift test: 141 tests across 21 suites (was 138) — no regressions
✓ swift build clean · 3 new export presentation tests green
✓ static added-line secret/injection scan: no findings · independent reviewer dispatched
↷ dogfood_check not run: non-release-impacting UI wiring; Docker unavailable in cron env
No signing identity, notarization, upload, Homebrew publication, GitHub Release, v1.0 tag, cron changes, or Telegram delivery attempted.
